morning_brief.preview:
# EverPass Morning Brief — Tuesday, May 5, 2026

## Critical / Time-Sensitive
1. **Charter / Taylor — NBA scope verified.** NBC commercial grant does NOT include NBA per 2026-05-05 three-source verification. Drafted reply pending Ryan's send.
2. **Charter amended agreement — deadline June 15, 2026.** Section I.1 BTS extension. All workstreams gate on signing. Owner: Ryan Blood.
3. **Charter Program Status DELAYED.** Sales 7/9, Control Pro 7/13. Three leadership decisions pending: cross-functional owner (ASAP), CSV bridge (mid-May), conjoined Fire Stick sales (before June).
4. **Pricing Sheet 5.4.26 v2 applied across Outputs + NFLST + PSP.** Partner-insights flagged for verification.
5. **Victory+ NWSL amendment EXECUTED 2026-05-02 via DocuSign.** Closed.

## Today's Schedule (May 5)
- 12:00 PM — NHL/EVERPASS Tech Call (Joseph Loreski)
- 1:00-2:30 PM — Management Sync (Alex Kaplan, 18 attendees, CT Conference Room)
- 2:30 PM — Weekly Touch Base
- 3:00 PM — FW: EverPass 2026/2027 Launch (Charter, Ligocki organizing, 85 attendees)

## Tomorrow's Schedule (May 6)
- 10:30 AM — DAZN catch up (Dan Gardiner)
- 11:00 AM — Apple/EverPass Integration Bi-Weekly (Daniel Hegeman)
- 11:30 AM — Marketing/Content catchup
- 12:30 PM — Weekly Catchup

## Active Partner Pulse (top intent)
- Charter: pending Ryan's NBA scope reply to Taylor + June 15 amendment deadline
- DIRECTV: legal/PR only posture; no commercial response
- NBCU: NBA NOT in existing commercial grant; side letter required if expansion needed
- Victory+: closed this week (NWSL amendment signed)
- NESN/Disney/Monumental/YES: incoming responses owed

## Recent Activity (last 7d)
8 partner-domain emails captured. Charter dominant inbound. Victory+ closed. Monumental DocuSign in flight.

critical.title: Charter / Taylor — NBA scope verified, draft response pending Ryan's send
critical.body: NBC commercial grant verified does NOT include NBA per 2026-05-05 three-source verification. Ryan drafted reply 2026-05-05 01:43Z. Awaiting his send to Taylor Holden.

critical.title: Charter amended agreement deadline — June 15, 2026
critical.body: Negotiation period extended Apr 29 from May 15 to June 15 (Section I.1 BTS dated July 5, 2025). Ryan owns. Multiple workstreams gate on signing.

critical.title: Charter Program Status — DELAYED
critical.body: NFL ST Sales delayed 6/1 to 7/9. Spectrum TV Control Pro delayed 6/15 to 7/13. ATX API GO/NO-GO same day as deal deadline (June 15). 3 leadership decisions pending: cross-functional NFL ST owner (ASAP), CSV bridge approve (mid-May), conjoined STVA + EP Fire Stick sales (before June).

critical.title: DIRECTV — Legal route + PR only
critical.body: No active commercial response. Pricing rack rates do NOT need to be quoted to DIRECTV per Ryan's 2026-05-05 directive. SymphonyAI demand letter due 2026-05-01 was the open Kelley Drye matter.

critical.title: Pricing Sheet 5.4.26 v2 applied
critical.body: New 2026 NFLST rack + Early Bird + 8-Pay (was 9-Pay) flowing through Price Book FY27 Outputs sheet. 12 Early Bird value updates + 12 formula divisor updates (/9 to /8) + 7 NFLST sheet writes + PSP $25.48 update. Charter / DIRECTV / Comcast / NBCU / Disney / YTTV partner-insights flagged for verification.

deals.next_action: Amended agreement deadline 6/15/2026. Spectrum TV Control Pro delayed 7/13. Fire Stick joint sales alignment needed before 5/21 STVA launch. Most recent inbound: Holden 5/5 Peacock/NBCSN commercial exclusivity Q. Owner: Ryan Blood.
NWSL AMENDMENT EXECUTED via DocuSign (Mary Karol). Move to completed this week.
Plaehn 5/5 inbound chasing response. Term sheet v7 in NESN court since Apr 19.
Altman 5/5 schedule outbound. EVO pricing gap + DAI impression share blank still open.
Upfront reminder 5/5 inbound. NBA scope confirmed NOT in commercial grant. Side letter / amendment required for any NBA commercial offering.
Feneque 4/29 inbound on Exhibit B device multiplier.
#REF! errors in Pricing tab need repair.
Critical path to Aug 2026 NFL kickoff.
No active commercial response. Pricing rack rates not quoted to DIRECTV per 2026-05-05 directive. SymphonyAI demand letter Kelley Drye matter.

bridge_signals.summary: Holden 4/29: Extension language confirmed (May 15 to June 15). Per our conversation: EverPass and Charter hereby agree to extend the negotiation period referenced in Section I.1 of the Binding Term Sheet entered into July 5, 2025.
